message:
fix: unassign work beads before releasing polecat name on removal

Adds unassignWorkBeads() to Manager.RemoveWithOptions that queries all
open/in_progress/hooked beads assigned to the polecat being removed and
resets them to status=open with empty assignee. Skips agent beads (handled
separately). Prevents orphaned beads permanently stuck with ghost assignees.

Root cause of orphaned tasks reported by witness (bd-xmf, bd-5ua, bd-6bq).

Closes: gt-e4u1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
